LanguageData.VCE_FlavourMaster.description: An expertise in randomly adding cooking condiments to meals on a whim.
LanguageData.VCE_FlavourMaster.label: Flavour mastery
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetChef.description: An expertise in improving meals beyond their usual level of quality.
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetChef.label: Gourmet cooking
